subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! The effulgent rays of the Divine Countenance have shed their radiance upon the Sinais of the hearts of men and women who have turned unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله تجلیات انوار وجه الهی بر طورهای قلوب مقبلین و مقبلات پرتو افکنده چه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power of the Manifestation of God
